_comment: LocalMask detection patterns — editable without touching code. Loaded at runtime by regex_rules_safe.py. Each entry: {pattern, confidence, level, reason}.

azure_sql_connection.reason: Azure SQL connection string with password

json_camelcase_apikey.reason: API key in JSON camelCase key

datadog_prefixed_key.reason: Datadog API/app key with dd_ prefix

connstr_userid_inline.reason: User ID in semicolon-delimited connection string

url_in_assignment.reason: URL assigned to a config/env key

url_internal_ip.reason: URL pointing to a private IP address

yaml_password.reason: Password/secret field in YAML (quoted or unquoted)

yaml_image.reason: image: in Docker Compose / K8s YAML

py_os_environ_secret.reason: os.environ access to secret env var name

boto3_hardcoded_key.reason: boto3 hardcoded AWS access key ID

boto3_hardcoded_secret.reason: boto3 hardcoded AWS secret access key

paramiko_password.reason: Paramiko SSH connect() with hardcoded password

subprocess_password_flag.reason: Password/secret passed as CLI flag to subprocess

subprocess_env_secret.reason: Secret injected into subprocess env dict

gcp_credentials_file.reason: GCP service account credentials file path

py_hardcoded_port_host.reason: Hardcoded IP address as host in Python

xml_user_attr.reason: user/uid= attribute in XML connection string

xml_server_attr.reason: server/Data Source in XML connection string

xml_appkey.reason: appSettings key with secret value in XML

xml_connstr_userid.reason: User ID in semicolon-delimited connection string

js_process_env_secret.reason: process.env access to secret variable name

js_private_key_string.reason: Private key embedded in JS/TS string

js_internal_url.reason: Internal service URL assigned in JS/TS

cs_sql_server_name.reason: SQL Server name in C# connection string

go_os_getenv_secret.reason: os.Getenv access to secret variable name in Go

go_struct_secret.reason: Secret field in Go struct literal

dockerfile_run_password.reason: Secret passed to RUN command in Dockerfile

dockerfile_from_registry.reason: Internal registry image in FROM instruction

gradle_api_key.reason: API key in Gradle build file

swift_provide_api_key.reason: SDK API key configuration in Swift

ruby_env_secret.reason: Secret assigned via ENV[] in Ruby/Fastfile

prose_s3_bucket.reason: S3 bucket name (with account suffix) in prose

prose_user_line.reason: Username on its own line in prose
